name: shipping
description: Check package status and redirect packages via the logistics system.

check.description: Check the current status and location of a package. Returns status, location, and tracking details. Use before redirect to confirm package state.

redirect.description: Redirect a package to a new destination. Requires the security code provided by the operator. Returns confirmation with new routing details. Call check first to verify current package state.

code.description: Security code provided by the operator for authorization
